MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Howard Spector, Esq., 415-752-9937 for plaintiff and moving party Charlene Williams

Ruling:
No other appearance on this matter. The Court granted PLAINTIFF CHARLENE WILLIAMS' Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY PROVIDED A COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND A TIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION AND REQUESTED IN THE TENTATIVE RULING. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/CWW)
